/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/Location.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/Button.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/ButtonMgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/SceneLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/ConversationManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/InventoryMgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/ImageCompression.cpp.o -o "Highline Ridge"  /usr/local/lib/libraylib.a -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo -L/usr/local/lib -lraylib /usr/local/Cellar/xz/5.8.3/lib/liblzma.dylib /usr/local/opt/jpeg-turbo/lib/libjpeg.dylib
